mapper.select: SELECT TRUNCATE(B.GIS_X, 3) AS grid_x, TRUNCATE(B.GIS_Y, 3) AS grid_y, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM emg_report_lwc A INNER JOIN resact_lwc B ON A.DSR_SEQ = B.DSR_SEQ WHERE A.DSR_SI_NM = #{region} AND A.DSP_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY TRUNCATE(B.GIS_X, 3), TRUNCATE(B.GIS_Y, 3)

SELECT A.PAT_SYM AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM emg_report_lwc A INNER JOIN resact_lwc B ON A.DSR_SEQ = B.DSR_SEQ WHERE TRUNCATE(B.GIS_X, 3) = CAST(#{grid_x} AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AND TRUNCATE(B.GIS_Y, 3) = CAST(#{grid_y} AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AND A.DSP_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY A.PAT_SYM ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT A.ACC_LOC AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM emg_report_lwc A INNER JOIN resact_lwc B ON A.DSR_SEQ = B.DSR_SEQ WHERE TRUNCATE(B.GIS_X, 3) = CAST(#{grid_x} AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AND TRUNCATE(B.GIS_Y, 3) = CAST(#{grid_y} AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AND A.DSP_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY A.ACC_LOC ORDER BY CNT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO start_point_lwc ( SEQ, -- SEQ 컬럼 추가 NAME, GIS_X, GIS_Y, RADIUS, LOCATION ) VALUES ( (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM start_point_lwc AS t), -- 번호 자동 생성 로직 #{NAME}, CAST(#{GIS_X} AS DOUBLE), CAST(#{GIS_Y} AS DOUBLE), CAST(#{RADIUS} AS SIGNED), #{LOCATION} )
mapper.select:
SELECT SEQ, NAME, GIS_X, GIS_Y, RADIUS, LOCATION FROM start_point_lwc
AND LOCATION LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT, /* [시간계산] 4자리(HHmm) 데이터 앞에 가상의 날짜를 붙여서 분 차이를 구함 */ /* getPointDetailStats 쿼리 중 시간 계산 부분 */ IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('20240101', A.DSP_TIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i'), STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('20240101', A.LOC_TIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i')), 0)), 1), 0) AS AVG_TIME,
IFNULL(GREATEST(MIN(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('20240101', A.DSP_TIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i'), STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('20240101', A.LOC_TIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i'))), 0), 0) AS MIN_TIME,
IFNULL(GREATEST(MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('20240101', A.DSP_TIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i'), STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('20240101', A.LOC_TIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i'))), 0), 0) AS MAX_TIME, /* [거리계산] DB 데이터가 이미 소수점이 포함된 km 단위이므로 그대로 사용 */ IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(A.LOC_DIS), 2), 0) AS AVG_DIST, IFNULL(ROUND(MIN(A.LOC_DIS), 2), 0) AS MIN_DIST, IFNULL(ROUND(MAX(A.LOC_DIS), 2), 0) AS MAX_DIST FROM emg_report_lwc A INNER JOIN resact_lwc B ON A.DSR_SEQ = B.DSR_SEQ WHERE A.DSP_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND (6371 * acos(cos(radians(CAST(#{GIS_Y} AS DOUBLE))) * cos(radians(B.GIS_Y)) * cos(radians(B.GIS_X) - radians(CAST(#{GIS_X} AS DOUBLE))) + sin(radians(CAST(#{GIS_Y} AS DOUBLE))) * sin(radians(B.GIS_Y))) * 1000) <= CAST(#{RADIUS} AS DOUBLE)

SELECT A.DSP_DATE AS LABEL, /* 일별 평균 시간 계산 */
IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('20240101', A.DSP_TIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i'), STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('20240101', A.LOC_TIME), '%Y%m%d%H%i')), 0)), 1), 0) AS AVG_TIME, /* 일별 평균 거리 계산 */ IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(A.LOC_DIS), 2), 0) AS AVG_DIST FROM emg_report_lwc A INNER JOIN resact_lwc B ON A.DSR_SEQ = B.DSR_SEQ WHERE A.DSP_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND (6371 * acos(cos(radians(CAST(#{GIS_Y} AS DOUBLE))) * cos(radians(B.GIS_Y)) * cos(radians(B.GIS_X) - radians(CAST(#{GIS_X} AS DOUBLE))) + sin(radians(CAST(#{GIS_Y} AS DOUBLE))) * sin(radians(B.GIS_Y))) * 1000) <= CAST(#{RADIUS} AS DOUBLE) GROUP BY A.DSP_DATE ORDER BY A.DSP_DATE ASC
